endpoints.name: Assign terminals
endpoints.description: Assigns one or more payment terminals to a merchant account or a store. You can also use this endpoint to reassign terminals between merchant accounts or stores, and to unassign a terminal and return it to company inventory.

assignTerminalCompany.description: Assign one or more terminals to the inventory of the company account.
assignTerminalCompany.summary: Assign a terminal to the company inventory

assignTerminalMerchant.description: Assign one or more terminals to the inventory of the merchant account.
assignTerminalMerchant.summary: Assign a terminal to the inventory of a merchant account

assignTerminalStore.description: Assign one or more terminals to the specified store.
assignTerminalStore.summary: Assign a terminal to a store

endpoints.notes: Replace {{ADYEN_API_KEY}} with your ADYEN API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the account or store of a terminal
endpoints.description: Returns the company account, merchant account, or store that a payment terminal is assigned to.

findTerminal.description: Returns the company account, merchant account, or store that the payment terminal is assigned to.
findTerminal.summary: Find where a terminal is assigned to

endpoints.notes: Replace {{ADYEN_API_KEY}} with your ADYEN API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the stores of an account
endpoints.description: Returns a list of stores associated with a company account or a merchant account, including the status of each store.

getStoresCompany.description: Returns a list of all stores associated with the specified company account.
getStoresCompany.summary: Get all the stores under a company

getStoresMerchant.description: Returns a list of all stores associated with the specified merchant account.
getStoresMerchant.summary: Get all the stores under a merchant account

endpoints.notes: Replace {{ADYEN_API_KEY}} with your ADYEN API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the details of a terminal
endpoints.description: Returns the details of a payment terminal, including where the terminal is assigned to. The response returns the same details that are provided in the terminal list in your Customer Area and in the Terminal Fleet report.

getTerminalDetails.description: Returns the details of a payment terminal, including where the terminal is assigned to.
getTerminalDetails.summary: Get information about a specific terminal

endpoints.notes: Replace {{ADYEN_API_KEY}} with your ADYEN API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the list of terminals
endpoints.description: Returns a list of payment terminals associated with a company account, merchant account, or store. The response shows whether the terminals are in the inventory, or in-store (ready for boarding or already boarded).

getTerminalsCompany.description: Returns a list of terminals associated with the company, indicating where each terminal is assigned to.
getTerminalsCompany.summary: Get all the terminals under a company account

getTerminalsMerchant.description: Returns a list of terminals associated with the merchant account, indicating where each terminal is assigned to.
getTerminalsMerchant.summary: Get all the terminals under a merchant account

getTerminalsStore.description: Returns a list of terminals assigned to the specified store.
getTerminalsStore.summary: Get all the terminals assigned to a store

endpoints.notes: Replace {{ADYEN_API_KEY}} with your ADYEN API KEY.
